description: Input schema for Wan 2.7 Video Edit.

prompt.description: Editing instruction describing what to change. Up to 5000 characters. E.g., 'Convert the scene to claymation style' or 'Replace the clothes with the ones from the reference image'.
prompt.title: Prompt

negative_prompt.description: Content to exclude from the video. Up to 500 characters.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

video.description: Video to edit. MP4/MOV, 2-10s, 240-4096px, up to 100MB.
video.title: Video

reference_images.description: Reference images for editing (e.g., clothing to apply). Up to 4 images. JPEG/JPG/PNG/BMP/WEBP, 240-8000px, up to 20MB each.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

ratio.description: Output aspect ratio. If omitted, matches input video ratio.

duration.description: Truncate video to this duration (seconds). Omit or 0 to keep original duration.
duration.title: Duration

audio_setting.description: Audio handling: 'auto' (model decides based on prompt) or 'origin' (keep original audio).

prompt_extend.description: Enable prompt rewriting via LLM for better results.
prompt_extend.title: Prompt Extend

watermark.description: Add 'AI Generated' watermark to bottom-right corner.
watermark.title: Watermark

title: AppInput
